name: call-center-platform
description: Microfrontend monorepo for call center platform

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "yarn workspace @call-center-platform/mfe-root dev" "yarn workspace @call-center-platform/mfe-shell dev" "yarn workspace @call-center-platform/mfe-call-center dev" "yarn workspace @call-center-platform/mfe-call-center-legacy dev"
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces run clean && rm -rf node_modules
